---
name: 🧪 Test Case
about: Suggest or report issues with test cases
title: "[TEST] "
labels: testing
assignees: ''

---

## Type
- [ ] Add new test case
- [ ] Fix existing test
- [ ] Improve test coverage
- [ ] Test fails unexpectedly

## Module
**Target Module**: (e.g., `03-aggregate-operators`, `12_window-functions`)
**Database(s)**: MySQL / PostgreSQL / SQLite / Redis

## Description
Describe the test case or issue clearly.

## Current Test (if applicable)
```sql
-- Current test query
```

## Expected Behavior
What should happen when this test runs?

## Actual Behavior (if fixing a test)
What's currently happening?

## Proposed Test Case
```sql
-- New or improved test query
```

## Test Data
Describe what data setup is needed:
- Base tables required:
- Sample data:
- Expected result set:

## Related Script
Link to the SQL script this test is for:
- File: `path/to/script.sql`
